title: ortholobium balansae
intro: Ortholobium balansae, also known as Orthosiphon balansae, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is part of the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Ortholobium balansae, such as teas and infusions, are commonly consumed in some regions to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
